lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: Welcome to Cobado's Groceries. Feeling hungry?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you have an orange on your head?

lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: Why don't you have an orange on your head?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Because it's not an item of clothing?

lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: Not for you perhaps, but it is for me.

lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: So anyway, looking to buy some food.

lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: You know you've got one on your head as well, right? Why have you done it?

lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: Exactly! Now we've cleared that up, looking to buy some food.

lines.speaker: Cobado
lines.text: Well come back when you're hungry.
